response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern tooling. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, which matches a required skill. His work with AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest equivalents via his own tools) aligns with the stack and cloud/container requirements. He has demonstrated architecture leadership, open-source contributions, and process improvement through CI/CD, code reviews, and workshops. His background includes Kotlin/Java via embedded and robotic systems, and he has built end-to-end systems across frontend and backend. His education includes a CS bachelor’s. His only potential gaps are limited explicit mention of Nest.js and PostgreSQL, and German language is only basic, though not critical for an engineering role. His AI-agent and developer tooling work is a strong differentiator.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React expertise
Proven AI-agent infrastructure development and developer tooling contributions
Strong architectural and DevOps skills with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, and CI/CD
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in experience (though Node.js and architecture skills are strong)
PostgreSQL experience not clearly documented (MongoDB and MySQL are listed)
German language is basic, which may limit collaboration in Berlin-based teams
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the core requirements with extensive full-stack experience, strong alignment with the primary stack, and rare AI-agent development experience that directly matches a key requirement. His architecture, DevOps, and testing skills are exceptional, and his open-source contributions demonstrate initiative and depth. While Nest.js and PostgreSQL are not explicitly cited, his Node.js and database experience are robust enough to imply quick adaptability. The German language limitation is minor for an engineering role. He is a standout candidate.
